text: Spanish Army VAMTAC vehicle fell from a parachute drop during training after a rigging failure, crashing from ~300m and being completely destroyed.
text_zh: 西班牙陆军一辆VAMTAC车辆在训练期间因索具故障从降落伞上坠落，从约300米高处坠毁并完全损毁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said that earlier this Thursday in the Aainata area of southern Lebanon, its soldiers identified two armed individuals who approached their position and posed an immediate threat. The soldiers engaged and eliminated the individuals to remove the threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，本周四早些时候在黎巴嫩南部Aainata地区，其士兵发现两名武装人员靠近其阵地并构成直接威胁。士兵们进行了交战并消灭了这些人员以消除威胁。 @wfwitness

text: Israeli troops, both active-duty and reservists, have been looting homes and businesses in southern Lebanon, taking items like motorcycles, TVs, and furniture. The practice is described as widespread and routine, with both junior and senior commanders reportedly aware but not taking disciplinary action to stop it. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 以色列军队，包括现役军人和预备役人员，一直在黎巴嫩南部抢劫民宅和企业，拿走摩托车、电视机和家具等物品。这种行为被描述为普遍且常规的，据报道，初级和高级指挥官都知道此事，但并未采取纪律处分来制止。来源：国土报

text: Germany’s Bundeswehr is struggling to recruit enough troops, so it’s targeting young people—especially gamers—through events like Gamescom.
text_zh: 德国联邦国防军正努力招募足够的士兵，因此通过Gamescom等活动瞄准年轻人，尤其是游戏玩家。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "🇱🇧l🇮🇱 Israeli soldiers inside a house in south Lebanon on 6-OctThere they are wrecking the house, checking it, and in a very envious tone full of lack of self-esteem they compare the house's quality and design to Gaza's." Reminds me of this. There are at least 4 documented Israeli burning of large expensive villas in this channel.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates: "🇱🇧l🇮🇱 10月6日黎巴嫩南部一所房子里的以色列士兵。他们在那里破坏房子，检查它，并以一种充满缺乏自尊的嫉妒语气将房子的质量和设计与加沙进行了比较。" 让我想起了这个。在这个频道里至少有4起有记录的以色列焚烧大型昂贵别墅的事件。

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : UPDATE: There are 4 minesweeping ships in the US Navy, 2 in Japan and 2 are en route to the CENTCOM/5th Fleet (may already be in the AOR). There are 3 Littoral Combat Ships (LCS) with mine countermeasures modules (MCM) assigned to CENTCOM/5th Fleet with only 1, the USS Canberra (LCS 30), likely in the region. The other 2, USS Tulsa (LCS 16) and USS Santa Barbara (LCS 32), were last spotted in the Malacca Strait heading back towards CENTCOM. h/t: @ianellisjones President Donald J. Trump has posted to his Truth Social account stating that he has ordered the U.S. Navy to "shoot and kill any boat" laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz without hesitation. He goes on to say that minesweepers are actively clearing the Strait right now and that he's ordered that activity to triple. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @TheIntelFrog : 更新：美国海军有4艘扫雷舰，2艘在日本，2艘正在前往中央司令部/第五舰队的途中（可能已经在责任区内）。有3艘濒海战斗舰（LCS）配备了反水雷模块（MCM）分配给中央司令部/第五舰队，其中只有1艘，即堪培拉号（LCS 30），可能在该地区。另外2艘，塔尔萨号（LCS 16）和圣巴巴拉号（LCS 32），最后一次被发现是在马六甲海峡，正返回中央司令部。致谢：@ianellisjones 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在他的“真实社交”账户上发帖称，他已命令美国海军“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只，毫不犹豫。他接着说，扫雷舰目前正在积极清理海峡，他已下令将该活动增加两倍。 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: ✡ Talking about Jewish morales: Regular and reserve soldiers are looting civilian property from homes and businesses in southern Lebanon, according to fighters and field commanders stationed in the area who spoke to Haaretz. According to the testimonies, the theft of motorcycles, televisions, paintings, sofas, and carpets has become widespread and commonplace, with no disciplinary action taken. The soldiers also load stolen equipment onto their vehicles upon leaving Lebanon, without any attempt to conceal it. One fighter said, "It's happening on a crazy scale. Everyone who takes something—televisions, cigarettes, tools, or anything else —immediately puts it in their vehicle or leaves it aside. It's not inside the military compound, but it's not done in secret. Everyone sees it." Full article: https://x.com/i/status/2047263903592145331
text_zh: ✡ 谈谈犹太人的道德：据驻扎在该地区并接受《国土报》采访的战斗人员和现场指挥官称，正规军和预备役士兵正在黎巴嫩南部抢劫民宅和企业的平民财产。据证词，偷窃摩托车、电视机、画作、沙发和地毯已变得普遍且司空见惯，且没有任何纪律处分。士兵们在离开黎巴嫩时还将偷来的设备装上他们的车辆，没有任何掩饰的企图。一名战斗人员说：“这正在以疯狂的规模发生。每个拿东西的人——电视机、香烟、工具或其他任何东西——都会立即把它放进他们的车里或放在一边。它不在军事大院内，但也不是秘密进行的。每个人都看到了。” 完整文章：https://x.com/i/status/2047263903592145331

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun after cabinet meeting in Beirut: Lebanon's ambassador to the U.S. will meet her Israeli counterpart in Washington tonight to seek a ceasefire extension and a halt to Israeli destruction of homes, places of worship, and the killing of journalists. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047346651950432730/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: "Israel is prepared to renew the war against Iran. The IDF is prepared for both defense and offense, and the targets are marked. We are waiting for the green light from the U.S., first and foremost, to complete the elimination of the Khamenei dynasty and to return Iran to the dark and stone ages by destroying Iran's major energy and power facilities. This time, our strikes will be different and more deadly, and will deliver further devastating blows to the most painful places, which will shake and collapse the regime's foundations." Israel Defense Minister Katz: Israel is prepared to renew the war against Iran. Waiting on a U.S. green light. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047343418771198286/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨：“以色列准备重启对伊朗的战争。以色列国防军已做好防御和进攻的准备，目标已经标记。我们首先等待美国的绿灯，以完成对哈梅内伊王朝的消灭，并通过摧毁伊朗的主要能源和电力设施，将伊朗带回黑暗和石器时代。这一次，我们的打击将是不同的，更致命的，并将对最痛苦的地方造成进一步的毁灭性打击，这将动摇并瓦解政权的基础。” 以色列国防部长卡茨：以色列准备重启对伊朗的战争。等待美国的绿灯。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047343418771198286/video/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Naval Blockade on Iran Failing Kepler reported: 9 ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz; only loaded vessels were sanctioned ships linked to Iran. Iranian-flagged ships continue operating despite the U.S. naval blockade. This highlights the limits of U.S. enforcement.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国对伊朗的海上封锁失败 开普勒报道：9艘船只通过了霍尔木兹海峡；只有装载的船只是与伊朗有关的受制裁船只。尽管美国实施了海上封锁，但悬挂伊朗国旗的船只仍在继续运营。这凸显了美国执法的局限性。

text: 📝 Бои к северу от Волчьей 📝 На Бурлукском направлении продолжаются бои к юго-западу от Волчанска . Бойцы пытаются закрепиться в Верхней Писаревке и атакуют в сторону Лосевки Одновременно с этим восточнее российские войска продолжают занимать новые позиции в приграничной зоне Харьковской области . Поступили объективные свидетельства, подтверждающие выход передовых отрядов ВС РФ к окраинам Бочково . Севернее него расположен обширный ландшафтный заказник «Северодонецкий», который и позволяет штурмовикам относительно безопасно добираться до передовых позиций противника. ➡️ На протяжении последних двух недель активность российских войск на обеих берегах Волчьей значительно увеличилась. Освобождено Зыбино и Волчанские Хутора , начаты бои за Покаляное и Бочково . Если раньше ГВ «Север» наступали на сравнительно узком участке фронта в Харьковской области , что позволяло противнику держать оборону небольшими силами, то сегодня наши войска продвигаются фактически по всей линии соприкосновения. Противник банально не знает, где ждать следующей атаки на границе. А «потушив пожар» в одном месте, командование ВСУ сразу же получает удар в другом, что также сказывается и на боевом духе украинских формирований. Это позволяет ВС РФ достаточно быстро расширять зону присутствия у Волчьей , оттесняя противника на южный берег реки. ➡️ Учитывая динамику боевых действий на участке и общий вектор продвижения «северян» не исключено, что в ближайшее время ВС РФ также начнут освобождение Малой Волчьей и Николаевки . Это позволит объединить плацдармы с подразделениями, действующими у Нестерного . 📌 Учитывая общий тренд на продвижение в приграничье на соседних Слобожанском и Сумском направлениях , в дальнейшем можно ожидать активизации действий ВС РФ и на других участках границы с Харьковской областью , где до этого годами сохранялся статичный фронт. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru ⭐️ @rybar совместно с @warriorofnorth #дайджест #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 沃尔恰河以北的战斗 📝 在布尔卢克方向，沃尔昌斯克西南部的战斗仍在继续。战士们正试图在Verkhnyaya Pisarevka站稳脚跟，并向Losevka方向发动进攻。与此同时，在东部，俄罗斯军队继续在哈尔科夫地区的边境地区占据新阵地。已有客观证据证实俄军先遣部队已抵达Bochkovo郊区。其北部是广阔的“北顿涅茨”景观保护区，这使得突击部队能够相对安全地到达敌人的前沿阵地。 ➡️ 在过去两周内，俄罗斯军队在沃尔恰河两岸的活动显著增加。Zybino和Volchanskie Khutora已被解放，针对Pokalyanoye和Bochkovo的战斗已经开始。如果说以前“北方”部队在哈尔科夫地区相对狭窄的战线上进攻，这使得敌人能够用少量兵力进行防御，那么今天我们的部队实际上是在整条接触线上推进。敌人根本不知道在边境哪里等待下一次攻击。而“扑灭”了一个地方的“火灾”，乌克兰武装部队指挥部立即在另一个地方遭到打击，这也影响了乌克兰部队的士气。这使得俄罗斯武装部队能够相当迅速地扩大在沃尔恰河附近的驻扎区，将敌人推向河的南岸。 ➡️ 考虑到该地区战斗的动态和“北方人”推进的总方向，不排除俄罗斯武装部队在不久的将来也将开始解放Malaya Volchya和Nikolaevka。这将使桥头堡与在Nesternoye附近行动的部队合并。 📌 考虑到在邻近的斯洛博然斯克和苏梅方向边境地区推进的总趋势，未来可以预期俄罗斯武装部队在哈尔科夫地区与边境的其他地区也会加强行动，那里多年来一直保持着静态战线。如果您对局势有补充，或者希望我们突出您部队的成功，您可以随时写信给我们的反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版本 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 ⭐️ @rybar 与 @warriorofnorth 合作 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "the age of darkness and stone by blowing up central energy and electricity facilities and crushing national economic infrastructure."" This is the problem Israel has not been harmed yet to make them feel pain. And there is currently no path to that under U.S and Arab air defense protection
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“通过炸毁中央能源和电力设施并摧毁国家经济基础设施，进入黑暗与石器时代。”这就是问题所在，以色列尚未受到伤害，无法让他们感到痛苦。而在美国和阿拉伯防空保护下，目前没有实现这一目标的途径。

text: Trump said Keir Starmer could still “recover” politically, but only if he changes direction. He criticized Starmer’s immigration stance, saying “if his immigration policies became strong, which right now they’re not, he can recover,” and warned: “if he doesn’t, I don’t think he has a chance.” Source: BBC
text_zh: 特朗普表示，基尔·斯塔默在政治上仍有“恢复”的机会，但前提是他必须改变方向。他批评了斯塔默的移民立场，称“如果他的移民政策变得强硬——目前并非如此——他就能恢复”，并警告说：“如果他不这样做，我认为他没有机会。”来源：BBC

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "complete the elimination of the Khamenei dynasty," This includes men, women, children Young old and elderly Very Jewish of him to talk about extermination of an entire family and dynasty.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“彻底消灭哈梅内伊王朝，”这包括男人、女人、孩子、年轻人和老人。他谈论灭绝整个家族和王朝，真是太“犹太”了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 The Lebanese President Joseph Aoun announced that a meeting will be held in Washington, D.C. this evening to discuss extending the ceasefire, including halting the destruction of homes and attacks on civilians, places of worship, journalists, and…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanese Information Minister Paul Morcos announced that Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has stated that any contact with Prime Minister Netanyahu is “absolutely out of the question”. The second meeting between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors in Washington is expected to take place at 11pm Lebanon time, focusing on extending the ceasefire. Aoun hopes to travel to Washington to present the truth about Lebanon’s situation to President Trump in detail, saying: “In my phone conversations with Trump, he showed empathy for Lebanon and stated that he loves Lebanon, and this is what should guide us in the future.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩宣布，今晚将在华盛顿特区举行会议，讨论延长停火协议，包括停止摧毁房屋以及停止对平民、礼拜场所、记者和……的袭击。” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩新闻部长保罗·莫尔科斯宣布，黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩表示，与内塔尼亚胡总理进行任何接触都是“绝对不可能的”。黎巴嫩和以色列大使之间的第二次会议预计将于黎巴嫩时间晚上11点在华盛顿举行，重点是延长停火协议。奥恩希望前往华盛顿，向特朗普总统详细陈述黎巴嫩局势的真相，他说：“在与特朗普的电话交谈中，他表现出对黎巴嫩的同情，并表示他热爱黎巴嫩，这应该是我们未来的指引。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 The Lebanese President Joseph Aoun announced that a meeting will be held in Washington, D.C. this evening to discuss extending the ceasefire, including halting the destruction of homes and attacks on civilians, places of worship, journalists, and medical and educational personnel. Lebanon’s ambassador to the United States, Nada Hamadeh Mouawad, will present these demands during the talks and push for their inclusion. President Joseph Aoun also stated that communications with Donald Trump focused on securing a ceasefire and launching negotiations aimed at ending the state of war with Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）宣布，今晚将在华盛顿特区举行会议，讨论延长停火协议，包括停止摧毁房屋以及停止对平民、礼拜场所、记者以及医疗和教育人员的袭击。黎巴嫩驻美国大使娜达·哈马德·穆阿瓦德（Nada Hamadeh Mouawad）将在会谈中提出这些要求，并推动将其纳入协议。约瑟夫·奥恩总统还表示，与唐纳德·特朗普的沟通重点在于确保停火，并启动旨在结束与以色列战争状态的谈判。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: We want to complete the elimination of the Khamenei dynasty.
text_zh: 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨（Israel Katz）：我们希望彻底消灭哈梅内伊王朝。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz said Israel is prepared to resume war against Iran, with the IDF ready in defence and offence and targets already marked. “We are waiting for a green light from the US – first and foremost to complete the elimination…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Full statement from Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz: Israel is prepared to resume the war against Iran. The IDF is ready both defensively and offensively, and the targets are marked. We are waiting for a green light from the United States, first and foremost to complete the elimination of the Khamenei dynasty, the initiator of the annihilation plan against Israel, and the successors of the leadership of the Iranian terror regime, and in addition to return Iran to the stone age by destroying its central energy and electricity facilities and crushing its national economic infrastructure. The terror regime in Iran specializes mainly in internal repression of the population through the Revolutionary Guards and the Basij, and in energy blackmail, threatening to raise global oil prices. It is on its knees; its leaders are hiding in tunnels and struggling to communicate and make decisions. Its skies are wide open, and all of its national infrastructure and strategic facilities are exposed to attacks, yet it declares that it is winning. Just like Hezbollah in Lebanon and Hamas in Gaza Strip, it does not care about the heavy price paid by the population, only about its own survival, which is not guaranteed either. This time, the attack will be different and more lethal, delivering devastating blows at the most painful points - building on the massive blows the Iranian terror regime has already suffered, shaking and collapsing its foundations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨表示，以色列准备恢复对伊朗的战争，以色列国防军（IDF）已做好防御和进攻准备，目标也已标记。‘我们正在等待美国的绿灯——首先是为了完成消灭……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨的完整声明：以色列已准备好恢复对伊朗的战争。以色列国防军在防御和进攻方面都已做好准备，目标也已标记。我们正在等待美国的绿灯，首先是为了彻底消灭哈梅内伊王朝——这一针对以色列的灭绝计划的发起者，以及伊朗恐怖政权领导层的继任者。此外，还要通过摧毁其核心能源和电力设施并粉碎其国民经济基础设施，将伊朗打回石器时代。伊朗的恐怖政权主要擅长通过革命卫队和巴斯基民兵对国内民众进行镇压，并擅长能源勒索，威胁要提高全球油价。它现在已经跪倒在地；其领导人躲在隧道里，难以进行沟通和决策。它的天空完全敞开，其所有的国家基础设施和战略设施都暴露在攻击之下，但它却宣称自己正在获胜。就像黎巴嫩的真主党和加沙地带的哈马斯一样，它不在乎民众付出的沉重代价，只在乎自己的生存，而这种生存也无法得到保证。这一次，攻击将与以往不同，且更具杀伤力，将在最痛点给予毁灭性打击——建立在伊朗恐怖政权已经遭受的沉重打击之上，动摇并瓦解其根基。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Channel 12: The Israeli mini-security cabinet will convene at 20:00 local time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 第12频道：以色列小型安全内阁将于当地时间20:00召开会议。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), 33 vessels have been directed back to Iranian ports or directed to turn back since the start of the U.S. blockade of vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047340935260881289/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布的消息，自美国开始对往返伊朗港口的船只实施封锁以来，已有33艘船只被指示返回伊朗港口或被要求折返。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047340935260881289/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Actually means exactly the opposite. Means the blockade is working, they have been turned back to port and have not been to export freely. 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ – According to Tankers Trackers 9 Iranian oil tankers were spotted at Chabahar port, an increase from the 5 oil tankers that were present there on April 21, 2026. This means 4 Iranian oil tankers were able to pass successfully through the U.S. blockade. https://twitter.com/MonitorX99800/status/2047339574108598446/photo/1 - MonitorX tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）实际上意思恰恰相反。这意味着封锁正在起作用，它们已被迫返回港口，无法自由出口。🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ – 根据油轮追踪（Tankers Trackers）的数据，在恰巴哈尔港（Chabahar port）发现了9艘伊朗油轮，比2026年4月21日在那里的5艘油轮有所增加。这意味着有4艘伊朗油轮成功通过了美国的封锁。https://twitter.com/MonitorX99800/status/2047339574108598446/photo/1 - MonitorX 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Spanish military vehicle worth roughly €600,000 detached during an airdrop exercise and fell 300 meters in free fall. The URO VAMTAC was completely destroyed on impact. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047339232562123087/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一辆价值约60万欧元的西班牙军车在空投演习中脱落，并自由落体坠落300米。这辆URO VAMTAC装甲车在撞击时完全损毁。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047339232562123087/video/1 推文
